goals: 員工可建立與送出請假申請、查詢自己的請假紀錄與狀態，並在審核前撤回。
主管可檢視並審核所屬部門或管理範圍內員工的請假申請。
系統可自動計算請假天數、剩餘假期額度，並避免日期衝突與超額申請。

validations.description: app entry is reachable from a cold start and no authenticated page content is rendered before identity is obtained

narrative.summary: 從系統入口導向登入頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 Entry.Init 觸發 choose_login，導向 LoginPage.Init，讓使用者從唯一登入入口開始驗證流程。

validations.description: Login page is shown as the only authentication entry, no employee or manager data is requested yet, and UI displays email/password fields

narrative.summary: Entry 包含 Login Page
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_entry 與 page_login 的父子階層，表示登入頁由系統入口統轄。

narrative.summary: Entry 包含 Auth Login Feature
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_entry 與 feature_auth_login 的父子階層，表示登入功能屬於入口層級可抵達的功能圖。

narrative.summary: Entry 包含 My Leave Page
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_entry 與 page_my_leave 的父子階層，表示我的請假頁屬於登入後可到達的主要頁面。

validations.description: LoginPage.Init is the single entry state for login navigation and page chrome shows no employee-only or manager-only actions

narrative.summary: 顯示登入表單
narrative.taskDescription: 進入 LoginPage.Init 後渲染登入表單，顯示 email 與 password 欄位，讓使用者可以準備提交帳密。

validations.description: login form renders email and password inputs, submit button is enabled only when required fields are present, and no leave data is shown

narrative.summary: 從系統入口導向登入頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 Entry.Init 觸發 choose_login，導向 LoginPage.Init，讓使用者從唯一登入入口開始驗證流程。

validations.description: Login page is shown as the only authentication entry, no employee or manager data is requested yet, and UI displays email/password fields

narrative.summary: 從登入頁進入登入功能
narrative.taskDescription: 在 LoginPage.Ready 送出帳號密碼後觸發 submit_credentials，進入 AuthLoginFeature.Init 執行驗證流程。

validations.description: submitting sends email and password once, login button enters loading state to prevent double-submit, and credentials are passed only to the auth API

narrative.summary: Entry 包含 Login Page
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_entry 與 page_login 的父子階層，表示登入頁由系統入口統轄。

validations.description: AuthLoginFeature.Init is reachable only from LoginPage and starts with no persisted employee or manager leave data in feature state

narrative.summary: 開始送出登入請求
narrative.taskDescription: 從登入功能入口觸發 start_login，送出一次登入請求並進入 Submitting 狀態等待驗證結果。

validations.description: POST /auth/login is issued once with email and password, loading indicator remains visible, and duplicate submits are blocked until a response returns

narrative.summary: 員工登入成功
narrative.taskDescription: 登入請求成功後依 employee 角色完成驗證，儲存 session 或 token，轉入 EmployeeAuthenticated。

validations.description: POST /auth/login returns 200, session or token is stored, response role=employee, and no manager-only permission is granted in client state

narrative.summary: 主管登入成功
narrative.taskDescription: 登入請求成功後依 manager 角色完成驗證，儲存 session 或 token 與審核範圍資訊，轉入 ManagerAuthenticated。

validations.description: POST /auth/login returns 200, session or token is stored, response role=manager, and manager approval scope metadata is available for later guarded pages

narrative.summary: 登入失敗
narrative.taskDescription: 登入請求失敗時轉入 Failed 狀態，顯示錯誤訊息且不得建立任何有效 session。

validations.description: POST /auth/login returns 401 for invalid credentials or a failure response, error message is shown inline, password field is cleared or masked, and no session is stored

narrative.summary: 從登入頁進入登入功能
narrative.taskDescription: 在 LoginPage.Ready 送出帳號密碼後觸發 submit_credentials，進入 AuthLoginFeature.Init 執行驗證流程。

validations.description: submitting sends email and password once, login button enters loading state to prevent double-submit, and credentials are passed only to the auth API

narrative.summary: 登入失敗後返回登入頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AuthLoginFeature.Failed 觸發 back_to_login，回到 LoginPage.Init 讓使用者修正帳密後重新登入。

validations.description: Login page is restored with email retained when allowed, previous auth error remains visible until the next submit, and no protected page is entered

narrative.summary: 員工登入後進入我的請假頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 EmployeeAuthenticated 觸發 login_done_employee，導向 MyLeavePage.Init 載入員工自己的請假清單。

validations.description: authenticated employee lands on My Leave page, GET my leave list returns only the employee's own requests, and manager-only navigation stays hidden

narrative.summary: 主管登入後進入我的請假頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 ManagerAuthenticated 觸發 login_done_manager，導向 MyLeavePage.Init 載入主管自己的請假清單與管理導覽。

validations.description: authenticated manager lands on My Leave page, own leave list loads successfully, and manager-only navigation for pending approvals and department calendar is visible exactly once

narrative.summary: 員工登入後返回請假詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 在 EmployeeAuthenticated 觸發 login_return_detail，導向 LeaveRequestDetailPage.Init，讓已驗證員工回到自己的請假詳情。

validations.description: when returnTo targets an owned request detail, GET /leave-requests/:id returns 200, detail data belongs to the authenticated employee, and unauthorized requests do not load

narrative.summary: 員工登入後返回剩餘假期頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 EmployeeAuthenticated 觸發 login_return_balance，導向 LeaveBalancePage.Init，讓已驗證員工回到自己的假期額度頁。

validations.description: when returnTo targets Leave Balance, GET /leave-balance returns 200 and each leave type shows quota, used, reserved, and available values for the employee

narrative.summary: 主管登入後返回待審核頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 ManagerAuthenticated 觸發 login_return_approvals，導向 PendingApprovalsPage.Init，讓已驗證主管回到待審核清單。

validations.description: when returnTo targets Pending Approvals, GET pending approvals returns 200 and only submitted requests inside the manager scope are returned

narrative.summary: 主管登入後返回部門日曆頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 ManagerAuthenticated 觸發 login_return_calendar，導向 DepartmentCalendarPage.Init，讓已驗證主管回到部門請假日曆。

validations.description: when returnTo targets Department Calendar, GET calendar returns 200 with in-scope submitted or approved events only and employee-private out-of-scope events are not exposed

narrative.summary: Entry 包含 Auth Login Feature
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_entry 與 feature_auth_login 的父子階層，表示登入功能屬於入口層級可抵達的功能圖。

source.sectionTitle: ④ 我的請假頁（My Leave Page）Base

validations.description: MyLeavePage.Init is reachable from login success and back navigation from protected pages, and the page starts without stale filter or row-selection corruption

narrative.summary: 載入我的請假清單
narrative.taskDescription: 從 MyLeavePage.Init 觸發 load_my_leaves，取得目前登入者自己的請假紀錄並進入 Ready。

validations.description: GET /leave-requests?mine=true returns 200, rows belong only to the current user, default sorting is start_date DESC or the configured default, and statuses show draft/submitted/approved/rejected/cancelled accurately

narrative.summary: 我的請假清單載入失敗
narrative.taskDescription: 當清單載入失敗時從 Init 轉入 Failed，保留可重試狀態且不可把舊資料當成最新資料展示。

validations.description: non-success list loading shows a recoverable failure state, previous rows are not displayed as if current, and retry remains available

narrative.summary: 重試載入我的請假清單
narrative.taskDescription: 在 Failed 狀態觸發 retry_load，重新回到 Init 並再次發送一次清單載入請求。

validations.description: retry triggers one new list request, successful retry restores the list, and failed retry stays in a recoverable failure state

narrative.summary: 員工登入後進入我的請假頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 EmployeeAuthenticated 觸發 login_done_employee，導向 MyLeavePage.Init 載入員工自己的請假清單。

validations.description: authenticated employee lands on My Leave page, GET my leave list returns only the employee's own requests, and manager-only navigation stays hidden

narrative.summary: 主管登入後進入我的請假頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 ManagerAuthenticated 觸發 login_done_manager，導向 MyLeavePage.Init 載入主管自己的請假清單與管理導覽。

validations.description: authenticated manager lands on My Leave page, own leave list loads successfully, and manager-only navigation for pending approvals and department calendar is visible exactly once

narrative.summary: 未登入時導回登入頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 MyLeavePage.Init 觸發 require_login 時，導回 LoginPage.Init，並保留 returnTo=/my-leaves。

validations.description: unauthenticated access redirects to Login page, API returns 401 or no session, returnTo=/my-leaves is preserved, and no leave list data is rendered

narrative.summary: 切入員工版我的請假流程
narrative.taskDescription: 在 MyLeavePage.Ready 依 employee 角色觸發 enter_employee_flow，切入 MyLeavePage.Employee.Init 顯示員工可用操作。

validations.description: employee view exposes filters, create request, detail navigation, and leave balance navigation only; pending approvals and department calendar actions are hidden

narrative.summary: 切入主管版我的請假流程
narrative.taskDescription: 在 MyLeavePage.Ready 依 manager 角色觸發 enter_manager_flow，切入 MyLeavePage.Manager.Init 顯示主管可用操作。

validations.description: manager view includes all employee actions plus pending approvals and department calendar navigation, and no duplicate CTA is rendered for the same destination

narrative.summary: Entry 包含 My Leave Page
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_entry 與 page_my_leave 的父子階層，表示我的請假頁屬於登入後可到達的主要頁面。

narrative.summary: My Leave Base 包含 Employee Delta
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_my_leave 與 page_my_leave_employee 的 base/delta 階層，表示員工完整頁面行為需與 base 組合閱讀。

narrative.summary: My Leave Base 包含 Manager Delta
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_my_leave 與 page_my_leave_manager 的 base/delta 階層，表示主管完整頁面行為需與 base 組合閱讀。

source.sectionTitle: ⑤ 我的請假頁（My Leave Page）Employee Delta

validations.description: Employee delta is entered only from MyLeavePage.Ready with role=employee and all visible requests still belong to the current employee

narrative.summary: 顯示員工版我的請假操作
narrative.taskDescription: 進入員工 delta 後顯示篩選器、建立請假、詳情與剩餘假期入口，並保持主管功能隱藏。

validations.description: filter controls, request rows, status badges, and create-request CTA are visible, and no manager-only approval controls appear

narrative.summary: 切入員工版我的請假流程
narrative.taskDescription: 在 MyLeavePage.Ready 依 employee 角色觸發 enter_employee_flow，切入 MyLeavePage.Employee.Init 顯示員工可用操作。

validations.description: employee view exposes filters, create request, detail navigation, and leave balance navigation only; pending approvals and department calendar actions are hidden

narrative.summary: 從我的請假開啟請假詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 在員工清單瀏覽狀態觸發 open_request，導向 LeaveRequestDetailPage.Init 查看自己的申請詳情。

validations.description: selecting a row opens owned request detail, GET /leave-requests/:id returns 200 for the employee's own request, and other employees' requests remain inaccessible with 403 or 404

narrative.summary: 從我的請假建立新申請
narrative.taskDescription: 在員工瀏覽狀態觸發 create_request，導向 LeaveRequestFormPage.Init 開啟空白請假表單。

validations.description: create action opens a blank leave request form with available leave types loaded, initial status implied as draft, and days field remains system-calculated and read-only

narrative.summary: 從我的請假查看剩餘假期
narrative.taskDescription: 在員工瀏覽狀態觸發 open_leave_balance，導向 LeaveBalancePage.Init 查看各假別額度。

validations.description: leave balance page opens successfully, each leave type shows quota, used, reserved, and available values, and available equals quota minus used minus reserved

narrative.summary: 重新整理我的請假清單
narrative.taskDescription: 在員工瀏覽狀態觸發 refresh_my_leaves，回到 MyLeavePage.Init 重新載入清單。

validations.description: refresh returns to MyLeavePage.Init, one list reload occurs, and current filter choices are preserved when supported by the UI

narrative.summary: My Leave Base 包含 Employee Delta
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_my_leave 與 page_my_leave_employee 的 base/delta 階層，表示員工完整頁面行為需與 base 組合閱讀。

source.sectionTitle: ⑥ 我的請假頁（My Leave Page）Manager Delta

validations.description: Manager delta is entered only from MyLeavePage.Ready with role=manager and the base list still contains only the manager's own leave requests

narrative.summary: 顯示主管版我的請假操作
narrative.taskDescription: 進入主管 delta 後顯示員工基本操作，並額外提供待審核與部門日曆入口。

validations.description: employee actions remain available to the manager, pending approvals and department calendar CTAs are visible, and each CTA appears only once

narrative.summary: 切入主管版我的請假流程
narrative.taskDescription: 在 MyLeavePage.Ready 依 manager 角色觸發 enter_manager_flow，切入 MyLeavePage.Manager.Init 顯示主管可用操作。

validations.description: manager view includes all employee actions plus pending approvals and department calendar navigation, and no duplicate CTA is rendered for the same destination

narrative.summary: 主管查看自己的請假詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 在主管瀏覽狀態觸發 open_own_request，導向 LeaveRequestDetailPage.Init 查看自己作為員工的申請詳情。

validations.description: manager can still open their own leave detail through My Leave, GET /leave-requests/:id returns 200 for owned requests, and approver-only actions are not shown unless the request is in approver scope and submitted

narrative.summary: 主管建立自己的請假申請
narrative.taskDescription: 在主管瀏覽狀態觸發 create_request，導向 LeaveRequestFormPage.Init 填寫主管自己的請假表單。

validations.description: manager can create their own leave request, form loads leave types and validation rules, and no subordinate employee data is editable from this flow

narrative.summary: 主管查看自己的剩餘假期
narrative.taskDescription: 在主管瀏覽狀態觸發 open_leave_balance，導向 LeaveBalancePage.Init 檢視主管帳號的假期額度。

validations.description: manager's own leave balances load successfully and values are scoped to the manager as an employee account, not to department totals

narrative.summary: 主管前往待審核清單
narrative.taskDescription: 在主管瀏覽狀態觸發 open_pending_approvals，導向 PendingApprovalsPage.Init 查看可審核的 submitted 請假。

validations.description: pending approvals page loads only for managers, returned rows are status=submitted, and each row belongs to the manager's allowed department or direct-report scope

narrative.summary: 主管前往部門請假日曆
narrative.taskDescription: 在主管瀏覽狀態觸發 open_department_calendar，導向 DepartmentCalendarPage.Init 檢視部門請假事件。

validations.description: department calendar loads manager-scope events only, approved events are shown, submitted events appear only when enabled, and status styling differentiates submitted versus approved

narrative.summary: 主管重新整理我的請假清單
narrative.taskDescription: 在主管瀏覽狀態觸發 refresh_my_leaves，回到 MyLeavePage.Init 重新載入自己的請假清單。

validations.description: refresh returns to MyLeavePage.Init, own leave list reloads once, and manager-only menu visibility is preserved after reload

narrative.summary: My Leave Base 包含 Manager Delta
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_my_leave 與 page_my_leave_manager 的 base/delta 階層，表示主管完整頁面行為需與 base 組合閱讀。

source.sectionTitle: ⑦ 請假詳情頁（Leave Request Detail Page）Base

validations.description: LeaveRequestDetailPage.Init is reachable from My Leave, Pending Approvals, and authenticated returnTo flows, and no stale detail data leaks from a previously viewed request

narrative.summary: 載入請假詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 從 LeaveRequestDetailPage.Init 觸發 load_detail，載入請假單完整內容並進入 Ready。

validations.description: GET /leave-requests/:id returns 200 only for the owner or an in-scope manager, UI shows leave type, dates, days, reason, attachment, status, and audit fields that exist for the current state

narrative.summary: 請假詳情不可讀取
narrative.taskDescription: 當詳情請求回傳 403 或 404 時轉入 Failed，禁止顯示任何敏感內容並提供安全返回路徑。

validations.description: 403 or 404 results in a safe failure state, sensitive leave details are not displayed, and the user is offered navigation back to an authorized page

narrative.summary: 從我的請假開啟請假詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 在員工清單瀏覽狀態觸發 open_request，導向 LeaveRequestDetailPage.Init 查看自己的申請詳情。

validations.description: selecting a row opens owned request detail, GET /leave-requests/:id returns 200 for the employee's own request, and other employees' requests remain inaccessible with 403 or 404

narrative.summary: 主管查看自己的請假詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 在主管瀏覽狀態觸發 open_own_request，導向 LeaveRequestDetailPage.Init 查看自己作為員工的申請詳情。

validations.description: manager can still open their own leave detail through My Leave, GET /leave-requests/:id returns 200 for owned requests, and approver-only actions are not shown unless the request is in approver scope and submitted

narrative.summary: 未登入時導回登入頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 LeaveRequestDetailPage.Init 偵測 require_login 時導向 LoginPage.Init，保留 returnTo 並避免渲染請假內容。

validations.description: unauthenticated access redirects to Login page, API returns 401 or no session, returnTo stores the requested detail route, and request content is not rendered

narrative.summary: 切入員工版請假詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 在 LeaveRequestDetailPage.Ready 依 owner 視角觸發 view_as_employee，切入員工 delta 顯示可提交或撤回的操作。

validations.description: owner view exposes only actions allowed to employees for the current status, and manager-only approve or reject controls remain hidden

narrative.summary: 切入主管版請假詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 在 LeaveRequestDetailPage.Ready 依 approver 視角觸發 view_as_manager，切入主管 delta 顯示核准與駁回操作。

validations.description: approver view is entered only when the viewer is a manager with request scope, employee identity fields are visible, and approve or reject controls appear only for status=submitted

narrative.summary: 詳情失敗時返回安全頁面
narrative.taskDescription: 在 LeaveRequestDetailPage.Failed 觸發 back_to_safe_page，回到 MyLeavePage.Init，避免停留在無權限的詳情狀態。

validations.description: safe navigation returns to My Leave without exposing forbidden request data, and the application remains usable after the failure state

narrative.summary: Entry 包含請假詳情頁
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_entry 與 page_leave_request_detail 的父子階層，表示請假詳情屬於登入後的頁面層級。

source.sectionTitle: ⑧ 請假詳情頁（Leave Request Detail Page）Employee Delta

validations.description: Employee delta is entered only for the request owner and all displayed fields remain scoped to that employee's own request

narrative.summary: 顯示員工版詳情操作
narrative.taskDescription: 進入員工詳情 delta 後顯示依狀態可用的編輯、送出、撤回或唯讀檢視操作。

validations.description: draft shows edit and submit actions, submitted shows cancel action, approved or rejected or cancelled are view-only, and action buttons match the current status exactly

narrative.summary: 切入員工版請假詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 在 LeaveRequestDetailPage.Ready 依 owner 視角觸發 view_as_employee，切入員工 delta 顯示可提交或撤回的操作。

validations.description: owner view exposes only actions allowed to employees for the current status, and manager-only approve or reject controls remain hidden

narrative.summary: 從詳情編輯 draft 申請
narrative.taskDescription: 在員工詳情檢視狀態觸發 edit_draft，導向 LeaveRequestFormPage.Init 編輯現有 draft。

validations.description: edit is available only when status=draft, edit route opens the existing draft values, and submitted or terminal statuses cannot enter the edit form

narrative.summary: 從詳情送出請假申請
narrative.taskDescription: 在員工詳情檢視狀態觸發 submit_request，進入 LeaveRequestStatusFeature.Init 執行 draft 送出流程。

validations.description: submit is available only when status=draft, submission must validate date order, overlap rules, available quota, and attachment requirement before any status change is committed

narrative.summary: 從詳情撤回已送出申請
narrative.taskDescription: 在員工詳情檢視狀態觸發 cancel_submitted，進入 LeaveRequestStatusFeature.Init 執行 submitted 撤回流程。

validations.description: cancel is available only when status=submitted and viewer is owner, no approve or reject action is triggered, and the request remains unchanged until cancellation succeeds

narrative.summary: 從詳情返回我的請假
narrative.taskDescription: 在員工詳情檢視狀態觸發 back_to_my_leaves，回到 MyLeavePage.Init 並保留 UI 支援的清單篩選或排序。

validations.description: back navigation returns to My Leave and list-level filters or sort remain preserved when supported by the UI

narrative.summary: Detail Base 包含 Employee Delta
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_leave_request_detail 與 page_leave_request_detail_employee 的 base/delta 階層，表示員工完整詳情行為需與 base 組合閱讀。

source.sectionTitle: ⑨ 請假詳情頁（Leave Request Detail Page）Manager Delta

validations.description: Manager delta is entered only for an in-scope manager and the page includes employee name, department, leave dates, days, reason, attachment, and current status

narrative.summary: 顯示主管版詳情操作
narrative.taskDescription: 進入主管詳情 delta 後顯示 submitted 可核准或駁回、其餘狀態唯讀的操作集合。

validations.description: approve and reject actions appear only when status=submitted, approved or rejected requests show audit records only, and out-of-scope managers do not reach this view

narrative.summary: 切入主管版請假詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 在 LeaveRequestDetailPage.Ready 依 approver 視角觸發 view_as_manager，切入主管 delta 顯示核准與駁回操作。

validations.description: approver view is entered only when the viewer is a manager with request scope, employee identity fields are visible, and approve or reject controls appear only for status=submitted

narrative.summary: 從詳情核准請假申請
narrative.taskDescription: 在主管詳情檢視狀態觸發 approve_request，進入 LeaveRequestStatusFeature.Init 執行核准流程。

validations.description: approve action is allowed only for manager role with request scope and status=submitted, duplicate approval clicks are blocked, and irreversible decision rules are enforced

narrative.summary: 從詳情駁回請假申請
narrative.taskDescription: 在主管詳情檢視狀態觸發 reject_request，進入 LeaveRequestStatusFeature.Init 執行駁回流程。

validations.description: reject action requires a non-empty rejection reason before request submission, manager scope is revalidated server-side, and no status change occurs until rejection succeeds

narrative.summary: 從詳情返回待審核清單
narrative.taskDescription: 在主管詳情檢視狀態觸發 back_to_pending_approvals，回到 PendingApprovalsPage.Init 並重新載入 submitted 待審資料。

validations.description: returning to pending approvals restores an authorized page, and recently decided items disappear from the submitted-only queue after reload

narrative.summary: Detail Base 包含 Manager Delta
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_leave_request_detail 與 page_leave_request_detail_manager 的 base/delta 階層，表示主管完整詳情行為需與 base 組合閱讀。

source.sectionTitle: ⑩ 請假表單頁（Leave Request Form Page）

validations.description: LeaveRequestFormPage.Init is reachable from create-request or draft-edit actions only and no terminal-status request is editable through this page

narrative.summary: 載入請假表單內容
narrative.taskDescription: 從 LeaveRequestFormPage.Init 觸發 load_form_context，載入假別、既有 draft 值與驗證規則後進入 Ready。

validations.description: leave types load successfully, existing draft values load when editing, days remains system-calculated and read-only, and attachment requirement metadata is available per leave type

narrative.summary: 請假表單內容載入失敗
narrative.taskDescription: 當表單上下文載入失敗時轉入 Failed，保留安全返回與可重試能力，不把舊草稿誤認為已同步。

validations.description: form context failure shows a recoverable failure state, stale draft values are not treated as saved, and retry or safe back navigation remains available

narrative.summary: 從我的請假建立新申請
narrative.taskDescription: 在員工瀏覽狀態觸發 create_request，導向 LeaveRequestFormPage.Init 開啟空白請假表單。

validations.description: create action opens a blank leave request form with available leave types loaded, initial status implied as draft, and days field remains system-calculated and read-only

narrative.summary: 主管建立自己的請假申請
narrative.taskDescription: 在主管瀏覽狀態觸發 create_request，導向 LeaveRequestFormPage.Init 填寫主管自己的請假表單。

validations.description: manager can create their own leave request, form loads leave types and validation rules, and no subordinate employee data is editable from this flow

narrative.summary: 從詳情編輯 draft 申請
narrative.taskDescription: 在員工詳情檢視狀態觸發 edit_draft，導向 LeaveRequestFormPage.Init 編輯現有 draft。

validations.description: edit is available only when status=draft, edit route opens the existing draft values, and submitted or terminal statuses cannot enter the edit form

narrative.summary: 未登入時導回登入頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 LeaveRequestFormPage.Init 偵測 require_login 時導向 LoginPage.Init，保留 returnTo 並避免暴露可編輯資料。

validations.description: unauthenticated access redirects to Login page, API returns 401 or no session, returnTo stores the form route, and editable request data is not exposed

narrative.summary: 從表單進入編輯功能
narrative.taskDescription: 在 LeaveRequestFormPage.Ready 觸發 open_form_editor，進入 LeaveRequestEditFeature.Init 編輯欄位與附件。

validations.description: form editor receives current field values, supports create and draft-edit flows only, and all validation rules remain tied to the selected leave type and date range

narrative.summary: 取消表單並返回我的請假
narrative.taskDescription: 在 LeaveRequestFormPage.Ready 觸發 cancel_form，回到 MyLeavePage.Init 且不產生隱性儲存。

validations.description: cancel leaves persisted data unchanged, no new request is created implicitly, and the user returns to My Leave safely

narrative.summary: 表單失敗時返回我的請假
narrative.taskDescription: 在 LeaveRequestFormPage.Failed 觸發 back_to_my_leaves，安全返回 MyLeavePage.Init，且不提交任何表單變更。

validations.description: safe navigation returns to My Leave without committing any form changes and the application remains usable after the form failure state

narrative.summary: Entry 包含請假表單頁
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_entry 與 page_leave_request_form 的父子階層，表示請假表單屬於登入後的頁面層級。

source.sectionTitle: ⑫ 剩餘假期頁（Leave Balance Page）

validations.description: LeaveBalancePage.Init is reachable from My Leave or authenticated returnTo and starts with no stale balance totals from another user

narrative.summary: 載入剩餘假期資料
narrative.taskDescription: 從 LeaveBalancePage.Init 觸發 load_balances，載入各假別 quota、used、reserved、available 後進入 Ready。

validations.description: GET /leave-balance returns 200, every leave type shows annual quota, used, reserved, and available, and available equals quota minus used minus reserved for each record

narrative.summary: 剩餘假期資料載入失敗
narrative.taskDescription: 當剩餘假期 API 載入失敗時轉入 Failed，避免把舊額度誤當成最新資料。

validations.description: balance load failure shows a recoverable failure state, stale totals are not displayed as current, and retry remains possible

narrative.summary: 重新整理剩餘假期資料
narrative.taskDescription: 在 LeaveBalancePage.Ready 觸發 refresh_balances，回到 Init 並重新請求一次剩餘假期資料。

validations.description: refresh triggers exactly one new balance request and updated submitted, approved, rejected, or cancelled effects appear in quota totals after reload

narrative.summary: 重試載入剩餘假期資料
narrative.taskDescription: 在 LeaveBalancePage.Failed 觸發 retry_load，重新回到 Init 並再次請求額度資料。

validations.description: retry reissues the balance request once and successful retry restores current balance values for the authenticated user

narrative.summary: 從我的請假查看剩餘假期
narrative.taskDescription: 在員工瀏覽狀態觸發 open_leave_balance，導向 LeaveBalancePage.Init 查看各假別額度。

validations.description: leave balance page opens successfully, each leave type shows quota, used, reserved, and available values, and available equals quota minus used minus reserved

narrative.summary: 主管查看自己的剩餘假期
narrative.taskDescription: 在主管瀏覽狀態觸發 open_leave_balance，導向 LeaveBalancePage.Init 檢視主管帳號的假期額度。

validations.description: manager's own leave balances load successfully and values are scoped to the manager as an employee account, not to department totals

narrative.summary: 未登入時導回登入頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 LeaveBalancePage.Init 偵測 require_login 時導向 LoginPage.Init，保留 returnTo=/leave-balance，且不顯示額度資訊。

validations.description: unauthenticated access redirects to Login page, API returns 401 or no session, returnTo=/leave-balance is preserved, and no balance values are shown

narrative.summary: 從剩餘假期返回我的請假
narrative.taskDescription: 在 LeaveBalancePage.Ready 觸發 back_to_my_leaves，安全返回 MyLeavePage.Init，且不改變任何額度資料。

validations.description: navigation returns to My Leave safely and no balance mutation occurs during the page change

narrative.summary: Entry 包含剩餘假期頁
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_entry 與 page_leave_balance 的父子階層，表示剩餘假期屬於登入後的頁面層級。

source.sectionTitle: ⑬ 待審核頁（Pending Approvals Page）

validations.description: PendingApprovalsPage.Init is reachable only from manager navigation or authorized returnTo and no approval data is shown before scope checks complete

narrative.summary: 載入待審核清單
narrative.taskDescription: 從 PendingApprovalsPage.Init 觸發 load_pending_approvals，載入主管可審核範圍內的 submitted 請假後進入 Ready。

validations.description: GET pending approvals returns 200, every row is status=submitted, rows are limited to the manager's department or direct-report scope, and sorting or filters are applied when configured

narrative.summary: 待審核清單載入失敗
narrative.taskDescription: 當待審核 API 載入失敗時轉入 Failed，避免重用過期的下屬請假資料。

validations.description: loading failure shows a recoverable failure state, previously fetched subordinate data is not reused as fresh data, and retry remains available

narrative.summary: 重試載入待審核清單
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PendingApprovalsPage.Failed 觸發 retry_load，回到 Init 並重新請求待審核資料。

validations.description: retry issues one new pending-approvals request and successful retry restores only current in-scope submitted items

narrative.summary: 主管前往待審核清單
narrative.taskDescription: 在主管瀏覽狀態觸發 open_pending_approvals，導向 PendingApprovalsPage.Init 查看可審核的 submitted 請假。

validations.description: pending approvals page loads only for managers, returned rows are status=submitted, and each row belongs to the manager's allowed department or direct-report scope

narrative.summary: 從詳情返回待審核清單
narrative.taskDescription: 在主管詳情檢視狀態觸發 back_to_pending_approvals，回到 PendingApprovalsPage.Init 並重新載入 submitted 待審資料。

validations.description: returning to pending approvals restores an authorized page, and recently decided items disappear from the submitted-only queue after reload

narrative.summary: 未登入時導回登入頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PendingApprovalsPage.Init 偵測 require_login 時導向 LoginPage.Init，保留 returnTo=/manager/approvals，且不顯示任何待審資料。

validations.description: unauthenticated access redirects to Login page, API returns 401 or no session, returnTo=/manager/approvals is preserved, and no pending-approval data is exposed

narrative.summary: 非主管存取時導回我的請假
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PendingApprovalsPage.Init 偵測 forbid_non_manager 時導向 MyLeavePage.Init，阻止非主管使用者看到待審資料。

validations.description: authenticated non-manager access is denied with 403 semantics, user is redirected to My Leave, and no manager-only approval queue is displayed

narrative.summary: 從待審核開啟請假詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PendingApprovalsPage.Ready 觸發 open_pending_request，導向 LeaveRequestDetailPage.Init 查看授權範圍內的請假詳情。

validations.description: opening a row leads to request detail only for in-scope requests, detail API returns 200 for authorized managers, and out-of-scope records do not open

narrative.summary: 從待審核切到部門日曆
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PendingApprovalsPage.Ready 觸發 open_department_calendar，導向 DepartmentCalendarPage.Init 查看相同審核範圍的請假事件。

validations.description: manager can switch to department calendar, calendar data stays within the same approval scope, and submitted or approved status markers remain distinguishable

narrative.summary: 從待審核返回我的請假
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PendingApprovalsPage.Ready 觸發 back_to_my_leaves，安全回到 MyLeavePage.Init，保持自己的請假清單與下屬待審資料分離。

validations.description: navigation returns to My Leave safely and the manager's own leave list remains separate from subordinate approval data

narrative.summary: Entry 包含待審核頁
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_entry 與 page_pending_approvals 的父子階層，表示待審核屬於登入後的頁面層級。

source.sectionTitle: ⑭ 部門請假日曆頁（Department Calendar Page）

validations.description: DepartmentCalendarPage.Init is reachable only from manager navigation or authorized returnTo and no department leave event is shown before scope validation completes

narrative.summary: 載入部門請假日曆
narrative.taskDescription: 從 DepartmentCalendarPage.Init 觸發 load_department_calendar，載入主管授權範圍內的部門請假事件後進入 Ready。

validations.description: calendar API returns 200, events are limited to the manager's allowed department or direct-report scope, approved events are shown, and submitted events appear only when the product setting allows them with distinct styling

narrative.summary: 部門請假日曆載入失敗
narrative.taskDescription: 當部門日曆 API 載入失敗時轉入 Failed，避免顯示過期或跨權限範圍的事件。

validations.description: calendar loading failure shows a recoverable failure state, stale department events are not displayed as current, and retry remains available

narrative.summary: 重試載入部門請假日曆
narrative.taskDescription: 在 DepartmentCalendarPage.Failed 觸發 retry_load，回到 Init 並重新請求部門日曆資料。

validations.description: retry issues one new calendar request and successful retry restores the current in-scope department events

narrative.summary: 主管前往部門請假日曆
narrative.taskDescription: 在主管瀏覽狀態觸發 open_department_calendar，導向 DepartmentCalendarPage.Init 檢視部門請假事件。

validations.description: department calendar loads manager-scope events only, approved events are shown, submitted events appear only when enabled, and status styling differentiates submitted versus approved

narrative.summary: 從待審核切到部門日曆
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PendingApprovalsPage.Ready 觸發 open_department_calendar，導向 DepartmentCalendarPage.Init 查看相同審核範圍的請假事件。

validations.description: manager can switch to department calendar, calendar data stays within the same approval scope, and submitted or approved status markers remain distinguishable

narrative.summary: 未登入時導回登入頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 DepartmentCalendarPage.Init 偵測 require_login 時導向 LoginPage.Init，保留 returnTo=/manager/calendar，且不顯示任何部門事件。

validations.description: unauthenticated access redirects to Login page, API returns 401 or no session, returnTo=/manager/calendar is preserved, and no calendar event data is exposed

narrative.summary: 非主管存取時導回我的請假
narrative.taskDescription: 在 DepartmentCalendarPage.Init 偵測 forbid_non_manager 時導向 MyLeavePage.Init，阻止非主管使用者看到部門日曆。

validations.description: authenticated non-manager access is denied with 403 semantics, user is redirected to My Leave, and manager-only calendar data stays hidden

narrative.summary: 從日曆開啟請假詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 在 DepartmentCalendarPage.Ready 觸發 open_calendar_request，導向 LeaveRequestDetailPage.Init 查看授權範圍內的事件詳情。

validations.description: clicking a calendar event opens detail only when the manager has access, detail API returns 200 for authorized events, and out-of-scope event details remain inaccessible with 403 or 404

narrative.summary: 從日曆返回待審核
narrative.taskDescription: 在 DepartmentCalendarPage.Ready 觸發 back_to_pending_approvals，回到 PendingApprovalsPage.Init 繼續處理 submitted 待審資料。

validations.description: returning to pending approvals preserves manager-only access control and the submitted-only queue can be reloaded without mixing calendar-only state

narrative.summary: 從日曆返回我的請假
narrative.taskDescription: 在 DepartmentCalendarPage.Ready 觸發 back_to_my_leaves，回到主管自己的 MyLeavePage.Init，且離開後不再顯示部門事件。

validations.description: navigation returns to the manager's own My Leave page and no department event data remains visible after leaving the calendar

narrative.summary: Entry 包含部門請假日曆頁
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_entry 與 page_department_calendar 的父子階層，表示部門日曆屬於登入後的頁面層級。

source.sectionTitle: ⑪ 請假表單編輯功能（Leave Request Edit Feature）

validations.description: LeaveRequestEditFeature.Init starts from the form page only and carries the current draft or new-request context without mutating server data yet

narrative.summary: 進入表單編輯狀態
narrative.taskDescription: 從 LeaveRequestEditFeature.Init 觸發 enter_editor，進入可編輯欄位與附件的編輯狀態。

validations.description: editable fields include leave type, start date, end date, reason, and attachment; days preview is calculated by the system and cannot be manually typed over

narrative.summary: 更新表單附件
narrative.taskDescription: 在編輯狀態觸發 update_attachment，進入附件上傳或替換流程，並保持其他欄位編輯上下文。

validations.description: attachment add or replace action updates only the attachment field, file upload progress or result is visible, and required-attachment leave types still enforce presence before submit

narrative.summary: 附件更新完成後返回編輯
narrative.taskDescription: 附件上傳完成後觸發 attachment_updated，返回 Editing 並讓表單反映最新附件狀態。

validations.description: uploaded attachment reference is reflected in the form, failed uploads do not mark attachment as present, and the user can continue editing other fields

narrative.summary: 儲存 draft 申請
narrative.taskDescription: 在編輯狀態觸發 save_draft，送出目前表單值儲存草稿並進入 SavingDraft。

validations.description: saving draft sends current form values without changing status beyond draft, server recalculates days from company workday rules, and no quota reservation is created on draft save

narrative.summary: 儲存 draft 失敗後回到編輯
narrative.taskDescription: 當草稿儲存失敗時觸發 draft_save_failed，回到 Editing 並保留尚未成功提交的輸入供修正。

validations.description: save failure leaves the user in edit mode, inline or form-level errors are shown, and unsaved local inputs remain available for correction
validations.expected: edit mode preserved after save failure

narrative.summary: 從表單進入編輯功能
narrative.taskDescription: 在 LeaveRequestFormPage.Ready 觸發 open_form_editor，進入 LeaveRequestEditFeature.Init 編輯欄位與附件。

validations.description: form editor receives current field values, supports create and draft-edit flows only, and all validation rules remain tied to the selected leave type and date range

narrative.summary: 草稿儲存成功後回到詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SavingDraft 成功完成後觸發 draft_saved，導向 LeaveRequestDetailPage.Init 以檢視最新儲存內容。

validations.description: save draft API returns 200, request status remains draft, updated fields and recalculated days persist, and detail page reflects the latest saved values

narrative.summary: 從編輯功能送出請假申請
narrative.taskDescription: 在編輯狀態觸發 submit_request，進入 LeaveRequestStatusFeature.Init 執行最終送出驗證與狀態變更。

validations.description: submit action leaves the form editor only after client-side required fields are present, server-side validation for dates, overlap, quota, and attachment is still required, and duplicate submit clicks are prevented

narrative.summary: 取消編輯並返回表單頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在編輯狀態觸發 cancel_edit，導向 LeaveRequestFormPage.Init，且不保存尚未提交的修改。

validations.description: cancel returns to the form page entry state, no unsaved edits are persisted, and the user can safely navigate away without altering stored draft data

narrative.summary: Entry 包含請假表單編輯功能
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_entry 與 feature_leave_request_edit 的父子階層，表示請假表單編輯屬於登入後可達的功能圖。

source.sectionTitle: ⑮ 請假狀態功能（Leave Request Status Feature）

validations.description: LeaveRequestStatusFeature.Init is entered only from a page or feature action that intends to submit, cancel, approve, or reject a single leave request

narrative.summary: 開始送出請假申請
narrative.taskDescription: 在狀態功能入口觸發 begin_submit，進入 Submitting，執行 draft 送出所需的伺服器驗證。

validations.description: submit path applies only to draft requests, server validates end_date >= start_date, overlap against draft or submitted or approved requests for the same employee, available quota >= requested days, and required attachments are present

narrative.summary: 開始撤回已送出申請
narrative.taskDescription: 在狀態功能入口觸發 begin_cancel，進入 Cancelling，執行 submitted 申請的撤回流程。

validations.description: cancel path applies only to submitted requests owned by the current employee, approved or rejected requests are blocked, and request state is unchanged until cancellation succeeds

narrative.summary: 開始核准請假申請
narrative.taskDescription: 在狀態功能入口觸發 begin_approve，進入 Approving，執行 submitted 申請的核准流程。

validations.description: approve path applies only to status=submitted and an in-scope manager, irreversible-decision rules are enforced, and repeated approval requests are rejected rather than double-processing

narrative.summary: 開始駁回請假申請
narrative.taskDescription: 在狀態功能入口觸發 begin_reject，進入 Rejecting，執行 submitted 申請的駁回流程。

validations.description: reject path applies only to status=submitted and an in-scope manager, a non-empty rejection reason is required, and no partial decision is stored before validation passes

narrative.summary: 從詳情送出請假申請
narrative.taskDescription: 在員工詳情檢視狀態觸發 submit_request，進入 LeaveRequestStatusFeature.Init 執行 draft 送出流程。

validations.description: submit is available only when status=draft, submission must validate date order, overlap rules, available quota, and attachment requirement before any status change is committed

narrative.summary: 從詳情撤回已送出申請
narrative.taskDescription: 在員工詳情檢視狀態觸發 cancel_submitted，進入 LeaveRequestStatusFeature.Init 執行 submitted 撤回流程。

validations.description: cancel is available only when status=submitted and viewer is owner, no approve or reject action is triggered, and the request remains unchanged until cancellation succeeds

narrative.summary: 從詳情核准請假申請
narrative.taskDescription: 在主管詳情檢視狀態觸發 approve_request，進入 LeaveRequestStatusFeature.Init 執行核准流程。

validations.description: approve action is allowed only for manager role with request scope and status=submitted, duplicate approval clicks are blocked, and irreversible decision rules are enforced

narrative.summary: 從詳情駁回請假申請
narrative.taskDescription: 在主管詳情檢視狀態觸發 reject_request，進入 LeaveRequestStatusFeature.Init 執行駁回流程。

validations.description: reject action requires a non-empty rejection reason before request submission, manager scope is revalidated server-side, and no status change occurs until rejection succeeds

narrative.summary: 從編輯功能送出請假申請
narrative.taskDescription: 在編輯狀態觸發 submit_request，進入 LeaveRequestStatusFeature.Init 執行最終送出驗證與狀態變更。

validations.description: submit action leaves the form editor only after client-side required fields are present, server-side validation for dates, overlap, quota, and attachment is still required, and duplicate submit clicks are prevented

narrative.summary: 送出成功後進入額度同步
narrative.taskDescription: 在 Submitting 完成持久化後觸發 submit_persisted，進入 LeaveBalanceSyncFeature.Init 執行預扣同步。

validations.description: request status becomes submitted, submitted_at is set, approval log records action=submit, and balance synchronization starts for reserve processing in the same business flow

narrative.summary: 送出失敗後返回詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 在 Submitting 驗證失敗時觸發 submit_denied，回到 LeaveRequestDetailPage.Init 顯示可修正的錯誤。

validations.description: validation failure returns 409 or 422, status remains draft, submitted_at is not set, reserved_days is unchanged, and detail page shows actionable validation errors

narrative.summary: 撤回成功後進入額度同步
narrative.taskDescription: 在 Cancelling 完成持久化後觸發 cancel_persisted，進入 LeaveBalanceSyncFeature.Init 執行預扣釋放同步。

validations.description: request status becomes cancelled, cancelled_at is set, approval log records action=cancel, and balance synchronization starts for releasing reserved quota

narrative.summary: 撤回失敗後返回詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 在 Cancelling 被拒絕時觸發 cancel_denied，回到 LeaveRequestDetailPage.Init 顯示撤回失敗結果。

validations.description: denied cancellation returns 409 or 403, status remains submitted, cancelled_at stays empty, and reserved quota is not released

narrative.summary: 核准成功後進入額度同步
narrative.taskDescription: 在 Approving 完成持久化後觸發 approve_persisted，進入 LeaveBalanceSyncFeature.Init 執行預扣轉已扣同步。

validations.description: request status becomes approved, approver_id and decided_at are set, approval log records action=approve, and balance synchronization starts for reserved-to-used conversion

narrative.summary: 核准失敗後返回詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 在 Approving 被拒絕時觸發 approve_denied，回到 LeaveRequestDetailPage.Init 顯示核准失敗結果。

validations.description: denied approval returns 403 or 409, request remains submitted, approver_id and decided_at remain unchanged, and no quota conversion occurs

narrative.summary: 駁回成功後進入額度同步
narrative.taskDescription: 在 Rejecting 完成持久化後觸發 reject_persisted，進入 LeaveBalanceSyncFeature.Init 執行預扣釋放同步。

validations.description: request status becomes rejected, rejection_reason and decided_at are set, approval log records action=reject, and balance synchronization starts for releasing reserved quota

narrative.summary: 駁回失敗後返回詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 在 Rejecting 被拒絕時觸發 reject_denied，回到 LeaveRequestDetailPage.Init 顯示駁回失敗結果。

validations.description: denied rejection returns 403, 409, or 422, request remains submitted, rejection_reason is not stored, and reserved quota is not released

narrative.summary: Entry 包含請假狀態功能
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_entry 與 feature_leave_request_status 的父子階層，表示請假狀態變更屬於登入後可達的功能圖。

source.sectionTitle: ⑯ 額度同步功能（Leave Balance Sync Feature）

validations.description: LeaveBalanceSyncFeature.Init starts only after a persisted leave-request state change and operates on the matching user's LeaveBalance and ledger records for the correct year and leave type
validations.expected: balance sync after persisted request change

narrative.summary: 開始 submitted 預扣同步
narrative.taskDescription: 在額度同步入口觸發 sync_submit_reserve，進入 Reserving，準備對 submitted 申請執行預扣。

validations.description: submit synchronization prepares a reservation flow only for status=submitted and checks that available quota cannot become negative after reservation

narrative.summary: 開始 cancel 或 reject 釋放同步
narrative.taskDescription: 在額度同步入口觸發 sync_cancel_or_reject_release，進入 Releasing，準備釋放先前的預扣額度。

validations.description: cancel or reject synchronization prepares release flow only for previously reserved requests and does not alter used_days

narrative.summary: 開始 approved 扣抵同步
narrative.taskDescription: 在額度同步入口觸發 sync_approve_deduct，進入 Deducting，準備把預扣轉成已扣額度。

validations.description: approve synchronization prepares reserved-to-used conversion only for previously reserved requests and keeps total quota accounting consistent

narrative.summary: 送出成功後進入額度同步
narrative.taskDescription: 在 Submitting 完成持久化後觸發 submit_persisted，進入 LeaveBalanceSyncFeature.Init 執行預扣同步。

validations.description: request status becomes submitted, submitted_at is set, approval log records action=submit, and balance synchronization starts for reserve processing in the same business flow

narrative.summary: 撤回成功後進入額度同步
narrative.taskDescription: 在 Cancelling 完成持久化後觸發 cancel_persisted，進入 LeaveBalanceSyncFeature.Init 執行預扣釋放同步。

validations.description: request status becomes cancelled, cancelled_at is set, approval log records action=cancel, and balance synchronization starts for releasing reserved quota

narrative.summary: 核准成功後進入額度同步
narrative.taskDescription: 在 Approving 完成持久化後觸發 approve_persisted，進入 LeaveBalanceSyncFeature.Init 執行預扣轉已扣同步。

validations.description: request status becomes approved, approver_id and decided_at are set, approval log records action=approve, and balance synchronization starts for reserved-to-used conversion

narrative.summary: 駁回成功後進入額度同步
narrative.taskDescription: 在 Rejecting 完成持久化後觸發 reject_persisted，進入 LeaveBalanceSyncFeature.Init 執行預扣釋放同步。

validations.description: request status becomes rejected, rejection_reason and decided_at are set, approval log records action=reject, and balance synchronization starts for releasing reserved quota

narrative.summary: 預扣成功後返回詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 在 Reserving 成功完成後觸發 reserve_success，回到 LeaveRequestDetailPage.Init 檢視 submitted 狀態與更新後額度。

validations.description: reserved_days increases by request.days, a reserve ledger entry is created, available decreases by the same amount, and detail page reload shows status=submitted with updated audit data

narrative.summary: 預扣失敗後返回詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 在 Reserving 失敗時觸發 reserve_failed，回到 LeaveRequestDetailPage.Init 顯示同步失敗結果並維持交易一致性。

validations.description: transaction rollback keeps reserved_days unchanged, no reserve ledger entry remains, request detail shows an actionable failure state, and inconsistent partial reservation is not visible

narrative.summary: 釋放預扣成功後返回詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 在 Releasing 成功完成後觸發 release_success，回到 LeaveRequestDetailPage.Init 檢視 cancelled 或 rejected 狀態與更新後額度。

validations.description: reserved_days decreases by request.days, a release_reserve ledger entry is created, available increases accordingly, and detail page reload shows cancelled or rejected status with updated audit fields

narrative.summary: 釋放預扣失敗後返回詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 在 Releasing 失敗時觸發 release_failed，回到 LeaveRequestDetailPage.Init 顯示同步失敗結果並避免重複 ledger。

validations.description: transaction rollback keeps reserved_days unchanged, no duplicate release ledger entry remains, and detail page does not show a misleading completed cancellation or rejection effect on balances

narrative.summary: 扣抵成功後返回詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 在 Deducting 成功完成後觸發 deduct_success，回到 LeaveRequestDetailPage.Init 檢視 approved 狀態與更新後額度。

validations.description: reserved_days decreases by request.days, used_days increases by request.days, a deduct ledger entry is created, available stays quota minus used minus reserved, and detail page reload shows approved status with approver and decision time

narrative.summary: 扣抵失敗後返回詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 在 Deducting 失敗時觸發 deduct_failed，回到 LeaveRequestDetailPage.Init 顯示同步失敗結果並維持帳務一致。

validations.description: transaction rollback prevents partial reserved-to-used conversion, ledger remains consistent without orphan records, and detail page does not show approved balance effects unless the deduction truly completed

narrative.summary: Entry 包含額度同步功能
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_entry 與 feature_leave_balance_sync 的父子階層，表示額度同步屬於登入後可達的功能圖。
